steps.step: Blend tomatoes and onions into a smooth puree.
Heat oil in a pot and fry the puree for 10 minutes until it thickens.
Add chicken stock, thyme, curry and salt. Bring to a boil.
Wash rice and add to the pot. Stir well.
Cover and cook on low heat for 30 minutes until rice is done.
Boil assorted meat with seasoning cubes and salt until tender.
Heat palm oil in a pot, mix in ground egusi and fry for 5 minutes.
Add meat stock and stir well. Cook for 10 minutes.
Add meat, stockfish, crayfish and pepper. Simmer for 15 minutes.
Stir in washed spinach, cook for 5 more minutes and serve with eba or pounded yam.
Soak beans in water for 30 minutes, then peel off the skins.
Blend beans with onion and pepper into a smooth thick batter.
Add salt and whisk the batter vigorously to make it fluffy.
Heat oil in a deep pan over medium heat.
Drop spoonfuls of batter into the oil and fry until golden brown on both sides.
Heat palm oil in a pot over medium heat.
Add periwinkles, crayfish, seasoning cubes, pepper and salt. Stir well.
Add waterleaf first and cook for 3 minutes until it wilts.
Add ugwu leaves and stir to combine. Cook for 5 minutes.
Serve hot with eba, pounded yam or fufu.
